name: Typewriter Text
description: Text that types out character by character with randomized speed, then deletes and cycles to next phrase. Gradient colored text with blinking cursor. Single phrase mode stays put after typing.
accessibility_notes: full phrase list should be in aria-label
blinking cursor may be distracting — respect prefers-reduced-motion

phrases.description: Array of strings to cycle through

typingSpeed.description: Base typing speed in ms per character

deletingSpeed.description: Deleting speed in ms per character

pauseDuration.description: Pause duration before deleting in ms

conflicts: no className prop — styling limited to parent wrapper
cursor blink animation hardcoded in inline style
usage_tip: Best for hero tagline rotation or terminal-style text effects.
